title: ChaosZPack [Lost Cities] Abandoned / Zombie Apocalypse
description: A Mod made for adding more structures into Lostcities !
body:
Support my Work through my Patreon!
[Click here ](https://patreon.com/chaoscraft_hd)


This mod was made for my Modpack ChaosZProject
it adds many new structures into lost cities

A Great Addition to Lost Cities !

Dependencies:
- Lostcities
- Horror Elements
- immersive weathering 
- Zombiekit
- Minetraps
- Keerdm's Zombie Apocalypse Essentials (Recommended)
- TacZ (for Loot Tables)





What is currently in the Mod:
- Abandoned Firestation (fully detailed)
- 2 Abandoned Buildings
- 4 Buildings in a row
- Crashed Helicopter
- Small Shop (fully detailed)
- a Medium Size Shop (fully detailed) 
- a Restaurant (fully detailed) 
- a Gas Station
- Scattered Houses
- 2 Huge Skyscrapers
- and many Tall Buildings

We Currently have a Total of 16 Unique Structures 

The Pictures in Gallery were only with 6 Structures

- Unique Custom Loot Tables for every type of Building with TacZ Intergration

Info:
you need to select the worldstyle testworld before creating a world


Big Credit to the Dev Team of OWZA for letting us use their buildings and refresh them with modded blocks 

Most of the buildings in this mod have been made by the OWZA Dev Team and we changed up the blocks and intergrated modded blocks into it

Link:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/open-world-zombie-apocalypse-survival/
